summary: Script correctly implements label assignment with glob support and follows bash best practices (set -euo pipefail, quoted vars, validation). Workflow permissions and triggers are sound. Issues: (1) Workflow missing actionlint validation step (task requirement); (2) Integration tests use loose assertions (grep for substrings vs exact output matching, lines 104-139); (3) glob_to_regex uses non-standard `[$char]` regex escaping syntax; (4) Integration-test job repeats 6+ test patterns without factoring common setup logic.
